nasb.text: Judah and all its cities will dwell together in it, the farmer and they who go about with flocks.

esv.text: And Judah and all its cities shall dwell there together, and the farmers and those who wander with their flocks.

cnv.text: 猶大各城的人、耕地的和領著群畜遊牧的，都要一起住在猶大。

ccb.text: “农夫和牧人必住在犹大的各城邑。
